zh.lifeSummary: 當Robert De Molyneux Lord Sefton於1135年出生在英國藍卡爾澤福頓時，他的父親Adam de Molyneux28歲，母親Annora de Gernet29歲。他和Beatrice de Villers至少有4個兒子。他去世於1168年在英國英格蘭藍卡爾沃林頓享年33歲。

nameMeanings.name: Molyneux
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): occupational name from Old French molineux ‘miller’, a variant of molineur, molinier. See Mulliner .
English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from an unidentified French placename.

variants.name: Mullineaux
meanings: Irish and English (Lancashire): variant of   Molyneux  .

variants.name: Mulliner
meanings: English: occupational name for a miller, from Old French molinier ‘miller’. Compare Molyneux .

variants.name: Molineaux
meanings: English (Lancashire and Staffordshire): variant of   Molyneux  .

variants.name: Molyneaux
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): variant of   Molyneux  . Compare   Mallonee  .

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

en.lifeSummary: When Robert De Molyneux Lord Sefton was born in 1135, in Sefton, Lancashire, England, his father, Adam de Molyneux, was 28 and his mother, Annora de Gernet, was 29. He had at least 4 sons with Beatrice de Villers. He died in 1168, in Warrington, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 33.

Il a eu au moins 4 fils avec Beatrice de Villers. Il est décédé en 1168, à Warrington, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 33 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: Robert De Molyneux Lord Sefton(이)가 1135년 영국 랭카실르 세프턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Adam de Molyneux(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Annora de Gernet(은)는 29세였다. 그는 Beatrice de Villers(와)과 적어도 네 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1168년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 워링턴에서 33세의 나이로 사망했다.
